cases.name: All Avatar story bands meet WCAG 2.1 AA (axe tags) with HTML + JSON artefacts
Story band "avatar-qa-default" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-size" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-attention" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-appearance" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-content" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-accent" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-disabled" has no serious/critical axe violations
Story band "avatar-qa-combos" has no serious/critical axe violations
Section 508 tag set reports no serious/critical issues in story bands
ARIA validity rules pass in Avatar story bands
Naming rules pass for buttons, images, and links in story bands
Label rule passes in Avatar story bands
Scrollable regions are keyboard-accessible when applicable
Non-text contrast rule passes when supported by axe-core
aria-live-region-content rule passes when supported
Default Avatar exposes role img and accessible name
Document has a valid lang attribute
Every showcase avatar has a non-empty accessible name
Decorative images inside avatars declare alt (may be empty)
SVG icons inside avatars are decorative or named
Disabled avatar row remains accessible (visual disabled only)
Tab moves focus to an interactive control on the page
Tab cycle visits multiple distinct targets (no keyboard trap)
First tab stop shows a visible focus indicator
Mode select activates with Enter when focused
Mode select activates with Space when focused
Story bands fit within 320px width without horizontal overflow
Avatars remain visible at 200% browser zoom

logs: 30 test(s) in Playwright report for functional.

cases.name: Visitor sees the Avatar playground and default profile image
Visitor can switch light/dark theme from the page header
Size band shows Figma scale including custom pixel size
Attention band shows high, medium, and low emphasis
Appearance band shows primary role and brand-bg extension row
Content band shows image, icon, and text (initials) modes
Accent stand-in band documents Figma accent via appearance roles
Disabled band contrasts enabled vs disabled presentation
Combination matrix renders all documented prop mixes
Page loads cleanly and default Avatar matches showcase props
Every playground data-testid renders without error text
Every story band (data-section) is visible on the page
Size prop maps Figma labels to code data-size values
Attention and appearance props surface on the DOM
Content prop maps image, icon, and text modes
Avatar sizes grow progressively and stay circular
Avatar is display-only and not activated by click
Tab focus stays on page chrome, not Avatar instances
Clicking Avatar does not move focus to the Avatar root
Default state shows image content with expected tokens
Avatar uses content prop instead of start/end slots
Avatar does not support selection or toggle
Avatar does not accept typed input
Avatar has no loading/slot dependency rules
Text mode shows initials derived from the alt name
Icon mode uses a decorative SVG; image mode uses presentation img
Playground fits narrow mobile width without horizontal scroll
Playground remains usable on large desktop viewport
Content band lays out image, icon, and text side by side
All story bands and sample avatars remain visible in dark theme
